title: HonorMod
description: The mod will add a system of honor and dishonor.
body:
HonorMod introduces a dynamic morality system to Minecraft, where every action you take-from slaying monsters to trading with villagers-shapes your reputation. Your Honor isn't just a number; it grants unique buffs, changes how the world perceives you, and unlocks special abilities.
The Honor System Your Honor ranges from 0 to 1000, starting at a neutral 500. Depending on your score, you will fall into one of five stages:
- Altruist (800+): A beacon of light. You gain a Strength buff, while nearby monsters receive a Weakness aura.
- Good (600-799): A respected hero. Villagers offer better trades and increased stock.
- Neutral (400-599): A traveler just passing through.
- Villain (200-399): Your reputation precedes you. Certain neutral animals like bees and dolphins may become aggressive.
- Tyrant (0-199): A dark force. Iron Golems attack you on sight, but your presence grants a Strength buff to nearby monsters.
